{{Quote|Sir, the ease of the tractor beam operation is in direct response to the tragic occurences''<sup>[sic]</sup>'' on the Star Destroyer ''Ackyuna''.|[[Tol Sivron]], to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]|<ref name="A Death Star Is Born">{{Tales|4|A Death Star Is Born}}</ref>}}
The '''''Ackyuna''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
